allow: Bash(node -e "const lib = require\('./tidal_lib'\); console.log\('OK. LIBRARY_PATH:', JSON.stringify\(lib.LIBRARY_PATH\), 'exports:', Object.keys\(lib\).length\);")

PowerShell($env:npm_config_platform = "darwin"; $env:npm_config_arch = "arm64"; node ./node_modules/ffmpeg-static/install.js; Remove-Item Env:npm_config_platform, Env:npm_config_arch; if \(Test-Path node_modules/ffmpeg-static/ffmpeg\) { \(Get-Item node_modules/ffmpeg-static/ffmpeg\).Length / 1MB } else { Write-Output "FAIL: ffmpeg binary not present" })

PowerShell($paths = @\("C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Microsoft\\WinGet\\Links\\gh.exe", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { Write-Output "Found: $p"; & $p --version 2>$null | Select-Object -First 1; break } })
Bash(node -e "const { authenticate } = require\('./tidal_auth_node'\); console.log\('authenticate export:', typeof authenticate\);")
